forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 72. East wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 2am, then showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 3am, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 60. East wind 6 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the afternoon in Boston meanders toward dusk, a thick gray blanket of clouds shrouds the city, hinting at the rain that is almost inevitably on its way. The air carries a certain heaviness, both in temperature and humidity, as the thermometer nudges close to a warm 72 degrees. The eastward winds sigh softly, providing little relief from the oppressive atmosphere that hints at impending showers. By tonight, the predicted rainfall promises a lively display, with the possibility of thunder echoing through the streets, followed closely by the thick fog that will wrap the buildings in mysterious whispers. 

In such a climate, those roaming the streets may wish to slip into something light yet water-resistant, perhaps a well-fitting raincoat paired with comfortable shoes, ready to meet the puddles with a sense of adventure. The charm of a neighborhood café, with the soft glow of lights spilling onto the sidewalk, becomes a delightful refuge, where one might savor a warm coffee as the evening settles in. Alternatively, embarking on an indoor outing, whether it be visiting a local gallery or delving into literature at a cozy bookstore, would be wise to escape the drizzles of a summer storm. As the weather dances between the realms of comfort and chill, this evening whispers of quiet moments waiting to be discovered amidst the clouds and rain.
